input_preview:
專案目標：
開發一個名為「男士 AI 護膚分析儀」的 Flutter 應用。整合 gpt 膚質分析、Firebase 後端，以及多元商業模式（聯盟行銷、贊助排名、訂閱制）。
技術需求細節：
用戶與權限; no testing right now
; change gemini api to gpt, also check security not letting api key go on github, write in gitignore, ; fix this issue 
A Dart VM Service on Chrome is available at: http://127.0.0.1:63728/qAeWXp6mV_Y=
The; Starting application from main method in: org-dartlang-app:/web_entrypoint.dart.
Failed to initializ; 目前走「測試電話號碼」流程
; _ProductTable will show loading circle when first loaded, can modified to static and after anaylsis ; 把歷史曲線改成「可切換 7 天 / 30 天 / 全部」並加日期標籤並確認以下需求對應狀態皆實作

Firebase Auth Email/Password：已在 AuthService 實作註冊/登; fix this issue
══╡ EXCEPTION CAUGHT BY RENDERING LIBRARY ╞══════════════════════════════════════════; still showing, i am using chrome to view it, also make it ajustable in other platform
tarting applic; when restart still showing ══╡ EXCEPTION CAUGHT BY RENDERING LIBRARY
╞══════════════════════════════; 仍看到同一行 DataTable 錯誤
; good this issue fix, but when i register firebase jump out firevase insuffifience permission but ski; 歷史曲線 show the query requires an index, current no data inside, fix this to show no record
; when press back, the sidebar tab歷史曲線 disappear, also when deploy, seperate each login so that it wil; if i login as admin and click admin dashboard, it will show permission error
also make the page text; fix this
The following assertion was thrown building
SelectableRegion-[LabeledGlobalKey<SelectableRe; write test and make the coverage to 75% if possible
; 再補 AuthService 與 HistoryCurvePage 的測試
; update readme also add a deployment yaml
; when click my favorite, can show what product added in my favorite, also if no api key analysis, ran; 把「我的最愛」改成同步 Firestore（登入後跨裝置保存）
; when click dashboard and back it will disappear, fix it
also compare current rule with below, which ; 新增更多廣告池（跑馬燈動態顯示）及提供商品範例圖片及測試連結, 測試商品增加圖片及使用者評價
; 改成從 Firestore 後台可編輯, admin dashboard can modified ads
; 增加多一點廣告池, 登出後回到初始一般頁面, 產品列表可簡單搜索並且改成一行2個產品
; 把廣告池加上「啟用/停用」與「排序權重」，後台可直接控制優先曝光, 整理home_page 如果可以拆解成易於維護的小模塊
; 有什麼可以改善或是優化的？
; 效能
圖片加快取與壓縮（cached_network_image），Grid 捲動會更順。
Firestore 成本
adConfigs、favorites 監聽可改「進頁訂閱、離頁取消」並加本地快取; 柔和的介面風格，搭配質感資訊卡、淡紫到藍色漸層，按鈕採用柔和圓角，清晰的焦點狀態，加入一個有質感的捲動觸發動畫效果，讓頁面看起來更完整，也更接近可直接上線的成品狀態，廣告輪播
; 首頁推薦產品一行3個 包含圖片 調整成適當大小 還有什麼可以優化的
; 產品卡加 Hero + 詳細頁，提升轉換率（點擊後有完整資訊與評價）。
Grid 加 skeleton loading（比轉圈更像正式產品）。
廣告輪播加入曝光/點擊事件追蹤（CTR 可量化）。
首頁; 還有什麼可以優化的？
; 轉換率最有感/效能/favorites/adConfigs 再加 TTL 快取（10 分鐘）與差異更新/安全/後台可用性/測試
; 提升services and widgets/home 測試率, 使整體測試率大約75%, update readme
; 準備發布第一版，請針對以下三點提供具體建議：安全性 (Security) 轉換與留存 (UX)搜尋優化 (SEO/Visibility) also any feature worth adding, ; 做一份「v1 上線檢查表（可勾選）」 also implement the above mentioned feature, i am using spark plan so currently no; add some unsplash photo for products and detail desciption on how we calculate skin score
; 加上「分數區間對應建議」（例如 1-3 穩定、4-6 需加強、7-10 高風險）讓使用者更容易理解圖表 also do final check (feature can be improved or ; adStats 改為純事件上報後端聚合（防灌水更完整）
詳情頁加入「降價通知」提升回訪率
include testing
做一份 release notes v0.1 and will publish; make picture larger and each product box size more fit, currently the box is a little too large
; 再更「精品感」一點
; 再做「精品版動態」
; 再加「按鈕 hover 漸層與 shine 掃光」做最後一層精品感
; 收尾做一個「v0.1 視覺凍結版」：統一所有卡片圓角/陰影/字級 token，讓整站風格完全一致。
;  in home page make _staticProducts image little bigger and fit in the box currently too many space b; 再做一版「靜態商品專用 badge（新手入門/人氣）」讓首頁首屏更像正式電商展示。
; 3 product in grid increase to 6
; 日間清爽防曬 picture is empty, get a new one, also each grid size length too large, try to decrease
; great each product grid add some user description and effect
; 顯示3評論 in each card and ready for version 0.1
; [$designer-turned-developer](/Users/Leo/.codex/skills/designer-turned-developer/SKILL.md)
for all pa; 直接做「全頁微交互統一版」（同一套 page-enter/stagger/hover timing token），讓動態節奏也完全一致。
; 做「互動節奏微調檔」：提供 relaxed / balanced / snappy 三種全域動畫節奏，一鍵切換。
; how about tet coverage
; without changing the functionality, will it be possible to improve test coverage to 90%?
; 直接開始補這批測試
; great, ready to release?
; 做一份「一鍵發布指令清單（Web + Firebase Hosting）」給你直接貼上執行 no leak secret info, focus on security
; 可直接貼上執行的「安全優先一鍵發布指令清單 is ok in readme github?
; 可直接貼進 README 的安全發布章節（中英雙語版）
; use integration_test or Patrol to do end to end testing
output_preview:
Done. I implemented `integration_test` E2E (not Patrol) and wired it into the project.

### What I changed
1. Added `integration_test` dependency  
- [/Users/Leo/Documents/sharpface/pubspec.yaml](/Use

output_preview:
Root cause confirmed and fixed.

### Cause
`LocalCacheService` was calling `jsonEncode(value)` directly.  
`AdPoolConfig.toMap()` includes Firestore sentinel values like `FieldValue.serverTimestamp()`
